TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Vietnam, title = Vietnam, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Vietnam} }

S.FORM: Vietnam u Vietnam sa i labu nu Ya-Cuo, itiza i 16 10 N, 107 50 E. u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa izaw ku 331,210 km2. u ahebal nu lala'ay sa izaw ku 310,070 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa izaw ku 21,140 km2. hamin nu tademawan sa 95,261,021. kakalukan umah sa 34.80%, kilakilangan umah sa 45%, zumaay henay umah sa 20.20%. tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Hanoi . kakinginan nu kanatal demiad kakinging nu kanatal demiad sa tusa bulad siwa demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (cong-tung) ayza sa ci TrŠļßn ńźŠļ°i Quang, micakat a demiad sa i 2016 a mihca sepat bulad tusa demiad. Hanoi ś≤≥ŚÖßŚłā(Ť∂äŚćóŤ™ě:Th√†nh phŠĽĎ H√† NŠĽôi) (Ť∂äŚćóŤ™ě:S√īng T√ī LŠĽčch) . Hanoi u satabakiay a tukay nu Vietnam . u Hanoi i amis nu Vietnam , teban nu satip atu amis, kawanan nu Hung-He atu Tan-Te-Ciyang , i teban nu Hung-He atu kakumudan nu Hung-He , Tan-Te-Ciyang i teban nu Hung-He atu Tan-Te-Ciyang sisa pangangan han tu Hanoi . u lumlum nu Kuziw kacapuan nu selangawan kalimulakan i ayaw nu Ye-Nan , 1000 a mihca ku likisi. namaka 1000 a mihca nu kalecuhan ni Ye-Su (11 a se-ci ), u tapan tu nu Ye-Nan i tukay yadah ku mukasiay a kining piyadahan 800 a mang ku tademaw, Cing-Cu ku katuuday. likisi nu Hanoi ŚÖ¨ŚÖÉŚČć2šłĖÁīÄ, ". ayaw hen nu 200 a mihcaan nu kalecuhan ni Jesus , laisan nu Han-Caw ku amis nu Vietnam patizeng han tu Cin kenis , cacay a malebutay a mihcaan a kuwanan nu China . Hanoi mala nikuwanan nu Ciyaw-Ce-Song-Pin kenis . 622 a mihca, u Tang-Caw nu China ku mikuwanay tu Ciyaw-Ce , Re-Nan atu Ciyu-Cen patizengan tu Ciyaw-Cu-Cung-Kuwan-Fu . likul u An-Nan-Tu-Hu-Fu An-Nan han ku China . 1428ŚĻī, . i 1428 a mihca Li-Caw a tapang nu mikeliday ci Li-Li mademec ku hitay nu Mi-Caw nu China , patizeng han tu Li-Caw . i Sen-Lung-Ceng hantu ku satabakiay a tukay (Hanoi han ayza). 1802 a mihcaan patizeng han tu Zuwan-Caw . 1873 a mihca, debungan nu Fa-Kuo ku Hanoi . 1888 a mihca papechnen nu Zuwan-Caw ku Hanoi , Hay-Fang-Su atu Sin-Kang ku France . i 1902 a mihca, linghen nu France ku tapang a tukay. namaka Sai Kung (ayca a Hu-Ci-Min patayzaen i Hanoi . 1940 a mihca, mademec ku Lipun a malais. tapang nu mikeliday ci Hu-Ci-Min nu Ye-Meng , laisan i waluay a bulad, patizeng han Ye-Nan-Min-Cu-Kung-He-Kuo patizeng han ku satabakiyay a tukay i Hanoi . 1946 a mihcaan midebung aca ku France i Hanoi , miliyas ku Ye-Mung tayza milimek i buyubuyuan mala yu-ci-tuey maka siwa a mihcaan, i 1945 a mihca, maalaw aca nu Pey-Ye ku Hanoi . i "nakalas nu Vietnam " (1955-1975), u zazan atu kayak a nu kazizeng, silamalay mamin a mapeci, nika kalah masanga' masinanut nu tademaw nu Ye-Nan. 1976 a mihcaan pitu a bulad sakatusa a demiad, malimuut makedet, masinanut ku kanatal nu Vietnam . u Hanoi ku salikulay a tapang nu tukay. Hu-Ci-Min tukay Si-Kung han i ayaw ku Hu-Ci-Min tukay nanu satabakiay a tukay nu Vietnam , u tatebanan nu sakaudip, pisiwbayan, pakacawan nu silamalay atu basu, u tatebanan nu selangawan nu binacadan. u nipangangan tu tatebanan nu mikeliday nu Vietnam ci Hu-Ci-Min tukay . 132. Hu-Ci-Min tukay , Tu-Long-Mu-Su , I-An-Su atu Sun-An-Su nu Pin-Yang kenis , Piyan-Hu-Su nu Tung-Nay kenis atu capiay a niyazu'. malawit ku 900 a mang nu tademaw. u Hu-Ci-Min tukay ku satabakiay a tukay i Vietnam atu "ayaw nikuwanan nu France a kanatal Ing-Tu-Ce-Nan " (u nikuwanan nu Fa-Lan-Si Ti-Kuo i Tung-Nan-Ya ), malaba amin ku niyazu', teban nu wili atu timu Ciya-Ciyen-Ciyang atu Lung-An kenis , 30 km2 adahal nu pala. 20 a mang ku tademaw. i 2020 a mihca, u kamu nu Mey-Su (ÁĺéšłĖ, Merecer), Cin-Ci-Siye-Sin-Si-Pu atu Fey-Cuo-Ku-Cin-Ci Wi Huy . u tekes nu tukay i sikay u saka 132 ku Hu-Ci-Min tukay . Hu-Ci-Min tukay satalakaway a yuping . i teban nu maci nu Sai Kung ku satalakaway a yuping. u singanganay a luma nu France i Sai Kung . u Fa-Kuo hen a nipikuwan a nisangaan i likul nu 19 a se-ci . u kalawlaway a kulid ku cabeng nu nisanga'an a luma'. salungan ku lalabu nu luma' mahaen nu mukasi. mahida u pangciw nu mali ku badahung. masakimulmulay a malikatay a sasingalan. . u sasing ni Hu-Ci-Min mapacait tu i teban nu tumunaw, i pabaw nu kawanan atu kawili idaw ku nikulitan tu kitidaan nu tademaw a kitakit nu France a ti-li-siye-cia a nikulitan. i tamunaw izaw ku sumanahay nisangaan tu patelian tu sapatelay tu baaday a kitakit u balakiay tu a yubin. tayzaay a labang midang i Hu-Ci-Min aka pawan micakay tu minsinpen. Sen-Mu-Ma-Li-Ya kiwkay (ŤĀĖśĮćÁĎ™ŤéČšļěśēôŚ†ā, Notre Dame Cathedral) . sumanahay a kiwkay nipatizeng yu France hen ku mikuwanay, sumanahay a kiwkay, i ayaw nu satabakiay a yubing, u salungan a nipatizeng a luma', nika caay ka tanektek ya kiwkay nipatudung tu Paris Sen-Mu-Yuen pacaitan tu cung a badahung 40 m ku takalaw namakazaay amis i France ku sapisanga.u cabeng i putah u sumanahay a lingka ku sapisanga tu madicemay a badahung, u labu nu kiwkay mahica u nu Ke-Teay a luma', yu kulikulitan a sasingalan atu masamulmulay a tenciw . ayaw nu kiwkay patizengan tu nisangaan ci Ma-Li-Yaan . 1945 a mihca nipakining nu Luo-Ma kiwkay .

tusu nu kanatar~…ĺ u tapaŇč tusu nu kanatar~…ĺ sa u ńßanoi . kakiŇčinan nu kanatar~…ĺ d…ômiad kakiŇčiŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ d…ômiad sa tusa bur~…ĺad siwa d…ômiad. tabakiaj a tapaŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ u tabakiaj tan-t…ô- ¶ijaŇč i t…ôban nu ńßuŇč-ńß…ô atu tan-t…ô- ¶ijaŇč sisa paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu ńßanoi . u r~…ĺumr~…ĺum nu kuziw ka ¶apuan nu s…ôr~…ĺaŇčawan kar~…ĺimur~…ĺakan i ajaw nu j…ô-nan , **** a mińß ¶a ku a kuwanan nu ¶ńßina . ńßanoi mar~…ĺa nikuwanan nu ¶ijaw- ¶…ô-soŇč-pin k…ônis . *** a mińß ¶a, u taŇč- ¶aw nu ¶ńßina ku mikuwanaj tu ¶ijaw- ¶…ô , *…ô-nan atu ¶iju- ¶…ôn patiz…ôŇčan tu ¶ijaw- ¶u- ¶uŇč-kuwan-fu . r~…ĺikur~…ĺ u an-nan-tu-ńßu-fu an-nan ńßan ku ¶ńßina . *****, . i **** a mińß ¶a r~…ĺi- ¶aw a tapaŇč nu mik…ôr~…ĺidaj ¶i r~…ĺi-r~…ĺi mad…ôm…ô ¶ ku ńßitaj nu mi- ¶aw nu ¶ńßina , patiz…ôŇč ńßan tu r~…ĺi- ¶aw . i s…ôn-r~…ĺuŇč- ¶…ôŇč ńßantu ku satabakiaj a tukaj (ńßanoi ńßan ajza). **** a mińß ¶aan patiz…ôŇč ńßan tu zuwan- ¶aw . **** a mińß ¶a, d…ôbuŇčan nu fa-kuo ku ńßanoi . **** a mińß ¶a pap…ô ¶ńßn…ôn nu zuwan- ¶aw ku ńßanoi , ńßaj-faŇč-su atu sin-kaŇč ku fran ¶…ô . i **** a mińß ¶a, r~…ĺiŇčńß…ôn nu fran ¶…ô ku tapaŇč a tukaj. namaka sai kuŇč (aj ¶a a ńßu- ¶i-min patajza…ôn i ńßanoi . **** a mińß ¶a, mad…ôm…ô ¶ ku r~…ĺipun a mar~…ĺais. tapaŇč nu mik…ôr~…ĺidaj ¶i ńßu- ¶i-min nu j…ô-m…ôŇč , r~…ĺaisan i war~…ĺuaj a bur~…ĺad, patiz…ôŇč ńßan j…ô-nan-min- ¶u-kuŇč-ńß…ô-kuo patiz…ôŇč ńßan ku satabakijaj a tukaj i ńßanoi . **** a mińß ¶aan mid…ôbuŇč a ¶a ku fran ¶…ô i ńßanoi , mir~…ĺijas ku j…ô-muŇč tajza mir~…ĺim…ôk i bujubujuan mar~…ĺa ju- ¶i-tu…ô maka siwa a mińß ¶aan, i **** a mińß ¶a, maar~…ĺaw a ¶a nu p…ô-j…ô ku ńßanoi . i "nakar~…ĺas nu *i…ôtnam " (****-****), u zazan atu kajak a nu kaziz…ôŇč, sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj mamin a map…ô ¶i, nika kar~…ĺańß masaŇča Ē~ ° masinanut nu tad…ômaw nu j…ô-nan. **** a mińß ¶aan pitu a bur~…ĺad sakatusa a d…ômiad, mar~…ĺimuut mak…ôd…ôt, masinanut ku kanatar~…ĺ nu *i…ôtnam . u ńßanoi ku sar~…ĺikur~…ĺaj a tapaŇč nu tukaj. ńßu- ¶i-min tukaj si-kuŇč ńßan i ajaw ku ńßu- ¶i-min tukaj nanu satabakiaj a tukaj nu *i…ôtnam , u tat…ôbanan nu sakaudip, pisiwbajan, paka ¶awan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj atu basu, u tat…ôbanan nu s…ôr~…ĺaŇčawan nu bina ¶adan. u nipaŇčaŇčan tu tat…ôbanan nu mik…ôr~…ĺidaj nu *i…ôtnam ¶i ńßu- ¶i-min tukaj . ***. ńßu- ¶i-min tukaj , tu-r~…ĺoŇč-mu-su , i-an-su atu sun-an-su nu pin-jaŇč k…ônis , pijan-ńßu-su nu tuŇč-naj k…ônis atu ¶apiaj a nijazu Ē~ °. mar~…ĺawit ku *** a maŇč nu tad…ômaw. u ńßu- ¶i-min tukaj ku satabakiaj a tukaj i *i…ôtnam atu "ajaw nikuwanan nu fran ¶…ô a kanatar~…ĺ iŇč-tu- ¶…ô-nan " (u nikuwanan nu fa-r~…ĺan-si ti-kuo i tuŇč-nan-ja ), mar~…ĺaba amin ku nijazu Ē~ °, t…ôban nu wir~…ĺi atu timu ¶ija- ¶ij…ôn- ¶ijaŇč atu r~…ĺuŇč-an k…ônis , ** km* adańßar~…ĺ nu par~…ĺa. ** a maŇč ku tad…ômaw. i **** a mińß ¶a, u kamu nu m…ô-su (**, m…ôr…ô ¶…ôr), ¶in- ¶i-sij…ô-sin-si-pu atu f…ô- ¶uo-ku- ¶in- ¶i wi ńßuj . u t…ôk…ôs nu tukaj i sikaj u saka *** ku ńßu- ¶i-min tukaj . ńßu- ¶i-min tukaj satar~…ĺakawaj a jupiŇč . i t…ôban nu ma ¶i nu sai kuŇč ku satar~…ĺakawaj a jupiŇč. u siŇčaŇčanaj a r~…ĺuma nu fran ¶…ô i sai kuŇč . u fa-kuo ńß…ôn a nipikuwan a nisaŇčaan i r~…ĺikur~…ĺ nu ** a s…ô- ¶i . u kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawaj a kur~…ĺid ku ¶ab…ôŇč nu nisaŇča Ē~ °an a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. sar~…ĺuŇčan ku r~…ĺar~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° mańßa…ôn nu mukasi. mańßida u paŇč ¶iw nu mar~…ĺi ku badańßuŇč. masakimur~…ĺmur~…ĺaj a mar~…ĺikataj a sasiŇčar~…ĺan. . u sasiŇč ni ńßu- ¶i-min mapa ¶ait tu i t…ôban nu tumunaw, i pabaw nu kawanan atu kawir~…ĺi idaw ku nikur~…ĺitan tu kitidaan nu tad…ômaw a kitakit nu fran ¶…ô a ti-r~…ĺi-sij…ô- ¶ia a nikur~…ĺitan. i tamunaw izaw ku sumanańßaj nisaŇčaan tu pat…ôr~…ĺian tu sapat…ôr~…ĺaj tu baadaj a kitakit u bar~…ĺakiaj tu a jubin. tajzaaj a r~…ĺabaŇč midaŇč i ńßu- ¶i-min aka pawan mi ¶akaj tu minsinp…ôn. s…ôn-mu-ma-r~…ĺi-ja kiwkaj (*******, notr…ô dam…ô ¶atńß…ôdrar~…ĺ) . sumanańßaj a kiwkaj nipatiz…ôŇč ju fran ¶…ô ńß…ôn ku mikuwanaj, sumanańßaj a kiwkaj, i ajaw nu satabakiaj a jubiŇč, u sar~…ĺuŇčan a nipatiz…ôŇč a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, nika ¶aaj ka tan…ôkt…ôk ja kiwkaj nipatuduŇč tu paris s…ôn-mu-ju…ôn pa ¶aitan tu ¶uŇč a badańßuŇč ** m ku takar~…ĺaw namakazaaj amis i fran ¶…ô ku sapisaŇča.u ¶ab…ôŇč i putańß u sumanańßaj a r~…ĺiŇčka ku sapisaŇča tu madi ¶…ômaj a badańßuŇč, u r~…ĺabu nu kiwkaj mańßi ¶a u nu k…ô-t…ôaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, ju kur~…ĺikur~…ĺitan a sasiŇčar~…ĺan atu masamur~…ĺmur~…ĺaj a t…ôn ¶iw . ajaw nu kiwkaj patiz…ôŇčan tu nisaŇčaan ¶i ma-r~…ĺi-jaan . **** a mińß ¶a nipakiniŇč nu r~…ĺuo-ma kiwkaj .
S.FORM: Vietnam u Vietnam sa i labu nu Ya-Cuo, itiza i 16 10 N, 107 50 E. u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa izaw ku 331,210 km2. u ahebal nu lala'ay sa izaw ku 310,070 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa izaw ku 21,140 km2. hamin nu tademawan sa 95,261,021. kakalukan umah sa 34.80%, kilakilangan umah sa 45%, zumaay henay umah sa 20.20%. tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Hanoi . kakinginan nu kanatal demiad kakinging nu kanatal demiad sa tusa bulad siwa demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (cong-tung) ayza sa ci TrŠļßn ńźŠļ°i Quang, micakat a demiad sa i 2016 a mihca sepat bulad tusa demiad. Hanoi ś≤≥ŚÖßŚłā(Ť∂äŚćóŤ™ě:Th√†nh phŠĽĎ H√† NŠĽôi) (Ť∂äŚćóŤ™ě:S√īng T√ī LŠĽčch) . Hanoi u satabakiay a tukay nu Vietnam . u Hanoi i amis nu Vietnam , teban nu satip atu amis, kawanan nu Hung-He atu Tan-Te-Ciyang , i teban nu Hung-He atu kakumudan nu Hung-He , Tan-Te-Ciyang i teban nu Hung-He atu Tan-Te-Ciyang sisa pangangan han tu Hanoi . u lumlum nu Kuziw kacapuan nu selangawan kalimulakan i ayaw nu Ye-Nan , 1000 a mihca ku likisi. namaka 1000 a mihca nu kalecuhan ni Ye-Su (11 a se-ci ), u tapan tu nu Ye-Nan i tukay yadah ku mukasiay a kining piyadahan 800 a mang ku tademaw, Cing-Cu ku katuuday. likisi nu Hanoi ŚÖ¨ŚÖÉŚČć2šłĖÁīÄ, ". ayaw hen nu 200 a mihcaan nu kalecuhan ni Jesus , laisan nu Han-Caw ku amis nu Vietnam patizeng han tu Cin kenis , cacay a malebutay a mihcaan a kuwanan nu China . Hanoi mala nikuwanan nu Ciyaw-Ce-Song-Pin kenis . 622 a mihca, u Tang-Caw nu China ku mikuwanay tu Ciyaw-Ce , Re-Nan atu Ciyu-Cen patizengan tu Ciyaw-Cu-Cung-Kuwan-Fu . likul u An-Nan-Tu-Hu-Fu An-Nan han ku China . 1428ŚĻī, . i 1428 a mihca Li-Caw a tapang nu mikeliday ci Li-Li mademec ku hitay nu Mi-Caw nu China , patizeng han tu Li-Caw . i Sen-Lung-Ceng hantu ku satabakiay a tukay (Hanoi han ayza). 1802 a mihcaan patizeng han tu Zuwan-Caw . 1873 a mihca, debungan nu Fa-Kuo ku Hanoi . 1888 a mihca papechnen nu Zuwan-Caw ku Hanoi , Hay-Fang-Su atu Sin-Kang ku France . i 1902 a mihca, linghen nu France ku tapang a tukay. namaka Sai Kung (ayca a Hu-Ci-Min patayzaen i Hanoi . 1940 a mihca, mademec ku Lipun a malais. tapang nu mikeliday ci Hu-Ci-Min nu Ye-Meng , laisan i waluay a bulad, patizeng han Ye-Nan-Min-Cu-Kung-He-Kuo patizeng han ku satabakiyay a tukay i Hanoi . 1946 a mihcaan midebung aca ku France i Hanoi , miliyas ku Ye-Mung tayza milimek i buyubuyuan mala yu-ci-tuey maka siwa a mihcaan, i 1945 a mihca, maalaw aca nu Pey-Ye ku Hanoi . i "nakalas nu Vietnam " (1955-1975), u zazan atu kayak a nu kazizeng, silamalay mamin a mapeci, nika kalah masanga' masinanut nu tademaw nu Ye-Nan. 1976 a mihcaan pitu a bulad sakatusa a demiad, malimuut makedet, masinanut ku kanatal nu Vietnam . u Hanoi ku salikulay a tapang nu tukay. Hu-Ci-Min tukay Si-Kung han i ayaw ku Hu-Ci-Min tukay nanu satabakiay a tukay nu Vietnam , u tatebanan nu sakaudip, pisiwbayan, pakacawan nu silamalay atu basu, u tatebanan nu selangawan nu binacadan. u nipangangan tu tatebanan nu mikeliday nu Vietnam ci Hu-Ci-Min tukay . 132. Hu-Ci-Min tukay , Tu-Long-Mu-Su , I-An-Su atu Sun-An-Su nu Pin-Yang kenis , Piyan-Hu-Su nu Tung-Nay kenis atu capiay a niyazu'. malawit ku 900 a mang nu tademaw. u Hu-Ci-Min tukay ku satabakiay a tukay i Vietnam atu "ayaw nikuwanan nu France a kanatal Ing-Tu-Ce-Nan " (u nikuwanan nu Fa-Lan-Si Ti-Kuo i Tung-Nan-Ya ), malaba amin ku niyazu', teban nu wili atu timu Ciya-Ciyen-Ciyang atu Lung-An kenis , 30 km2 adahal nu pala. 20 a mang ku tademaw. i 2020 a mihca, u kamu nu Mey-Su (ÁĺéšłĖ, Merecer), Cin-Ci-Siye-Sin-Si-Pu atu Fey-Cuo-Ku-Cin-Ci Wi Huy . u tekes nu tukay i sikay u saka 132 ku Hu-Ci-Min tukay . Hu-Ci-Min tukay satalakaway a yuping . i teban nu maci nu Sai Kung ku satalakaway a yuping. u singanganay a luma nu France i Sai Kung . u Fa-Kuo hen a nipikuwan a nisangaan i likul nu 19 a se-ci . u kalawlaway a kulid ku cabeng nu nisanga'an a luma'. salungan ku lalabu nu luma' mahaen nu mukasi. mahida u pangciw nu mali ku badahung. masakimulmulay a malikatay a sasingalan. . u sasing ni Hu-Ci-Min mapacait tu i teban nu tumunaw, i pabaw nu kawanan atu kawili idaw ku nikulitan tu kitidaan nu tademaw a kitakit nu France a ti-li-siye-cia a nikulitan. i tamunaw izaw ku sumanahay nisangaan tu patelian tu sapatelay tu baaday a kitakit u balakiay tu a yubin. tayzaay a labang midang i Hu-Ci-Min aka pawan micakay tu minsinpen. Sen-Mu-Ma-Li-Ya kiwkay (ŤĀĖśĮćÁĎ™ŤéČšļěśēôŚ†ā, Notre Dame Cathedral) . sumanahay a kiwkay nipatizeng yu France hen ku mikuwanay, sumanahay a kiwkay, i ayaw nu satabakiay a yubing, u salungan a nipatizeng a luma', nika caay ka tanektek ya kiwkay nipatudung tu Paris Sen-Mu-Yuen pacaitan tu cung a badahung 40 m ku takalaw namakazaay amis i France ku sapisanga.u cabeng i putah u sumanahay a lingka ku sapisanga tu madicemay a badahung, u labu nu kiwkay mahica u nu Ke-Teay a luma', yu kulikulitan a sasingalan atu masamulmulay a tenciw . ayaw nu kiwkay patizengan tu nisangaan ci Ma-Li-Yaan . 1945 a mihca nipakining nu Luo-Ma kiwkay .

***,*** km*, u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu nanumaj sa izaw ku **,*** km*. ńßamin nu tad…ômawan sa **,***,***. kakar~…ĺukan umańß sa **.**%, kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan umańß sa **%, zumaaj ńß…ônaj umańß sa **.**%. tapaŇč
